content: Vitest 4.1.8 for SvelteKit/Svelte 5: integrate via vite.config.ts with plugins:[sveltekit()]. Pure logic tests run in node environment. Browser mode via @vitest/browser 4.1.8 + vitest-browser-svelte 2.1.1 + playwright 1.60.0: test browser config uses provider:playwright(), instances:[{browser:'chromium'}]. Component test uses render() from vitest-browser-svelte + expect.element() locators. Run npx playwright install before first browser-mode test run. Multi-project setup separates node tests from browser tests.
